title: Torch Bow
body:
# Torch Bow Datapack
![Torch Bow usage demo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3ca499ba-9bdb-48c6-b696-5443e0dc22b2)

## How to Use
1. Hold the torch in your offhand
2. Shoot the bow
3. Torch is lit

## 
**Concept from [TorchBowMod by noriokun4649](https://modrinth.com/mod/torchbowmod)**
